dict.string: $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
Fsm
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
fsm
APPL
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NAME)
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NUMBER)
LaunchScreen
Main
This app needs location access to track work orders and provide location-based services for field service management.
This app needs location access to track work orders and provide location-based services for field service management, even when the app is in the background.
This app needs background location access to track work orders and provide continuous location-based services for field service management.
This app needs camera access to take photos of work orders, equipment, and documentation for field service reports.
This app needs photo library access to select and attach images to work orders and service documentation.
This app needs permission to save photos to your photo library for work order documentation.
This app needs microphone access to record voice notes and audio documentation for work orders.
This app needs contacts access to quickly add customer and team member information to work orders.
This app needs calendar access to schedule and manage work order appointments and service calls.
This app needs reminders access to create and manage task reminders for work orders and service activities.
This app uses motion data to detect work activity and improve location accuracy for field service tracking.
This app uses Bluetooth to connect to IoT devices and equipment sensors for enhanced field service capabilities.
This app uses Bluetooth to communicate with field equipment and IoT devices for service management.
This app needs access to documents to manage work order files, manuals, and service documentation.
This app needs local network access to communicate with on-site equipment and local servers.
